claim_boundary: Unified symbolic construction only. Coefficients and the physical scale remain symbolic/provisional where not derived; no frozen prediction, gauge coupling, Wilson coefficient, rare-B prediction, or full BHSM completion is promoted.
hessian: block Hessian diag/coupled by interaction second variations around a stationary background

operators.adjoint: self-adjoint under geometric pairing when boundary flux vanishes
operators.domain: metric perturbations modulo fixed boundary/collar conditions
operators.invertibility_conditions: gauge/shape fixing plus positive Hessian sector

operators.adjoint: Hermitian using h_rho, Hodge star, and adjoint trace
operators.invertibility_conditions: invertible only after gauge-fixed domain and zero-mode projection

operators.adjoint: formally self-adjoint or skew-adjoint according to spin convention
operators.domain: spinor/generation module with Hermitian boundary condition
operators.invertibility_conditions: inverse requires spectral gap and boundary condition

operators.adjoint: self-adjoint under real scalar inner product

operators.invertibility_conditions: invertible only after neutral scale/action normalization
operators.kernel_or_zero_modes: neutral kernel zero modes/open scale modes

operators.adjoint: real symmetric one-dimensional Hessian in reduced sector
operators.kernel_or_zero_modes: zero mode if physical scale is not selected
